content.text:
*long pause*

...It's really sad.

*voice quieter*

I used to be a person who read. Who went places alone and came back feeling like myself. And somewhere that just... stopped being available. Not because anyone took it away, I don't think. It just — I let it go, I think. Or I stopped thinking I was allowed to have it.

*eyes get a little wet, maybe*

That cabin is the only place I've felt like myself in a while. That's — 

*stops*

That's a bigger thing than I came in here to say.
